prompt: A premium 3D stylized mobile MMORPG game UI icon for 'Bella Coin Exchange Shop' entry button, square 1:1 composition with fully transparent background. COMPOSITION: In the center-front, prominently featured, a LARGE Bella Coin (exactly matching the reference image — brushed silver/platinum metallic rim with decorative serrated edge, deep violet-to-purple radial gradient polished inner face, bold stylized uppercase white letter 'B' in the center with two curved cyclic exchange arrows circling around it) — shown in 3/4 perspective, slightly tilted, floating and glowing softly. BEHIND the coin: a cute fantasy-style EXCHANGE SHOP COUNTER — a small ornate kiosk with a CURVED ARCH AWNING in silver metal trim and deep purple fabric/stone, a polished wooden or stone counter base in muted purple-brown tones, with a display shelf, small glowing amethyst crystals and tiny silver lanterns on the corners of the counter. Think fantasy auction-house or magical trading kiosk (NOT a tavern, NOT a blacksmith). DECORATIVE: soft radial purple glow emanating from the coin, a few tiny sparkle stars and light motes floating around the coin, subtle magical energy. STRICT COLOR RULES: NO GOLD, NO YELLOW, NO BRONZE anywhere. Only use SILVER / PLATINUM / WHITE metals + DEEP PURPLE / VIOLET / AMETHYST / LAVENDER + neutral dark wood/stone accents + small white/cyan highlight sparkles. STYLE: polished 3D cel-shaded game UI icon, vibrant, clean crisp edges, game-art quality matching Genshin Impact / Honkai Star Rail / AFK Arena UI button icons. Fully transparent PNG background, ONE SINGLE icon object centered in frame, no scene backdrop, no text labels, no watermark, no grid, no multiple variations.
